description_long: This coupe car object consists of four visually striking sports cars, each with a low, aerodynamic profile and sleek, contoured bodywork. The cars are finished in a variety of eye-catching colors: metallic blue, gold, and a chameleon-like iridescent paint with purple and teal hues. Each car features prominent side air intakes, low ground clearance, and large, sporty wheels with detailed rims. The front ends are aggressive, with sharp headlights and sculpted hoods, while the rear showcases wide stances and visible engine covers. The windows are tinted and the rooflines are smooth, flowing seamlessly into the rear of the vehicles. These cars are designed for high performance and visual impact, making them stand out in any urban environment.
description: A group of four sleek, low-profile coupe sports cars in metallic blue, gold, and iridescent finishes, featuring aggressive styling and large wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and profile of all four cars, highlighting their aerodynamic shapes and distinctive paint finishes.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the roof contours, engine covers, and the arrangement of the cars in a row.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the length and side details, with the color order reversed from view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the aggressive front fascias, headlights, and grille designs of each car.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
